items.name: Urban Street Denim Bermuda Shorts
items.description:
Step out in style with these trendy denim Bermuda shorts featuring a unique paisley pattern. Designed with distressed wash detailing, these shorts offer a modern twist to classic denim. The layered tie-dye graphic leggings underneath add an extra pop of color and flair, making these shorts a perfect fit for an urban street style look. Ideal for casual outings or music festivals, they bring a bold and fashionable vibe to any avatar's wardrobe.
